sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this game

special_mechanics.name: Stance Shifting
special_mechanics.description: Fighters automatically assume a defensive stance when not attacking. Players can raise or lower their arms to shift between blocking/attacking high or blocking/attacking low

special_mechanics.name: Two Attack Types
special_mechanics.description: Weak punch: less damage and knockback, faster and harder to defend against. Strong punch: more damage and knockback, takes longer to perform, easier to block/dodge/interrupt

special_mechanics.name: Environmental Hazards
special_mechanics.description: Flower pots drop from windows, dealing damage and temporary stun. Patrol cars pass by and reset fighter positions

special_mechanics.name: Push Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Successful attacks push opponent toward screen edge. When stamina depleted, all attacks inflict knockback equivalent to strong punch

special_mechanics.name: Knockoff Win Condition
special_mechanics.description: Round ends when fighter is pushed to edge of screen and knocked off sidewalk onto street

tier_notes: Tier 3 (Empirical/Qualitative): No precise physics parameters documented. Urban Champion is a fighting game with minimal jump/platforming mechanics. Movement is grounded and focused on horizontal positioning and stance management. No technical movement data available in public sources.
